github_failed_workflow_runs_7d.title: Weekly Failed Workflow Runs

github_merged_prs_last_week.description: Pull requests merged in the last 7 days
github_merged_prs_last_week.title: Weekly PR Throughput

github_pr_cycle_time.title: Monthly PR Cycle Time

github_pr_cycle_time_weekly.description: Average time from PR creation to merge (last week)
github_pr_cycle_time_weekly.title: Weekly PR Cycle Time

github_workflow_runs_30d.title: Monthly Workflow Runs

github_workflow_runs_7d.description: Total workflow runs in the last 7 days
github_workflow_runs_7d.title: Weekly Workflow Runs

services_count.description: Total number of services in the organization
services_count.title: Number of Services

failure_rate_trend.calculation: ((if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end) - (if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_7d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d) * 100 | floor else 0 end)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
failure_rate_trend.description: Weekly failure rate vs monthly average — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
failure_rate_trend.title: Workflow Failure Rate Trend

github_cycle_time_trend.calculation: ((.properties.github_pr_cycle_time // 0) - (.properties.github_pr_cycle_time_weekly // 0)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
github_cycle_time_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR cycle time — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
github_cycle_time_trend.title: PR Cycle Time Trend

github_merged_prs_per_service_last_month.calculation: if (.properties.services_count != null and .properties.services_count != 0) then (.properties.github_merged_prs_last_month / .properties.services_count) else 0 end
github_merged_prs_per_service_last_month.description: PRs merged in the last 30 days divided by number of services in the organization
github_merged_prs_per_service_last_month.title: Monthly PR Throughput per Service

github_stale_pr_share_percent.calculation: if (.properties.github_open_prs != null and .properties.github_open_prs != 0) then (.properties.github_stale_prs_7d / .properties.github_open_prs) * 100 else 0 end
github_stale_pr_share_percent.description: Percentage of open PRs that are older than 7 days
github_stale_pr_share_percent.title: Stale PR Share (%)

github_throughput_trend.calculation: ((.properties.github_merged_prs_last_week // 0) * 30 - (.properties.github_merged_prs_last_month // 0) * 7) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
github_throughput_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR throughput rate — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
github_throughput_trend.title: PR Throughput Trend

monthly_workflow_failure_rate.calculation: if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end
monthly_workflow_failure_rate.description: Percentage of workflow runs that failed in the last 30 days
monthly_workflow_failure_rate.title: Monthly Workflow Failure Rate (%)

weekly_workflow_failure_rate.calculation: if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_7d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d) * 100 | floor else 0 end
weekly_workflow_failure_rate.description: Percentage of workflow runs that failed in the last 7 days
weekly_workflow_failure_rate.title: Weekly Workflow Failure Rate (%)

deploy_freq_tier.calculation: if (.properties.total_deployments == null or .properties.total_deployments == 0) then "Low" else if (.properties.deployment_frequency // 0) >= 7 then "Elite" elif (.properties.deployment_frequency // 0) >= 1 then "High" elif (.properties.deployment_frequency // 0) >= 0.25 then "Medium" else "Low" end end
deploy_freq_tier.description: DORA deployment frequency tier (from production deployments)
deploy_freq_tier.title: Deployment Frequency

github_cycle_time_trend.calculation: ((.properties.github_pr_cycle_time // 0) - (.properties.github_pr_cycle_time_weekly // 0)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
github_cycle_time_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR cycle time
github_cycle_time_trend.title: PR Cycle Time Trend

github_days_since_last_push.calculation: if .properties.github_last_push != null then ((now - (.properties.github_last_push[0:19] + "Z" | fromdateiso8601)) / 86400 | floor) else 9999 end
github_days_since_last_push.description: Number of days since the last code push
github_days_since_last_push.title: Days Since Last Push

github_failure_rate_trend.calculation: ((if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end) - (if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_7d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d) * 100 | floor else 0 end)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
github_failure_rate_trend.description: Weekly failure rate vs monthly average
github_failure_rate_trend.title: Workflow Failure Rate Trend

github_lead_time_tier.calculation: if (.properties.github_lead_time_for_change == null) then "Low" elif .properties.github_lead_time_for_change <= 24 then "Elite" elif .properties.github_lead_time_for_change <= 168 then "High" elif .properties.github_lead_time_for_change <= 720 then "Medium" else "Low" end
github_lead_time_tier.description: DORA lead time for changes tier (from GitHub PR cycle time)
github_lead_time_tier.title: Lead Time for Changes (GitHub)

github_monthly_workflow_failure_rate.calculation: if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end
github_monthly_workflow_failure_rate.description: Percentage of workflow runs that failed in the last 30 days
github_monthly_workflow_failure_rate.title: Monthly Workflow Failure Rate (%)

github_stale_pr_share_percent.calculation: if (.properties.github_open_prs != null and .properties.github_open_prs != 0) then (.properties.github_stale_prs_7d / .properties.github_open_prs) * 100 else 0 end
github_stale_pr_share_percent.description: Percentage of open PRs that are older than 7 days
github_stale_pr_share_percent.title: Stale PR Share (%)

github_throughput_trend.calculation: ((.properties.github_merged_prs_last_week // 0) * 30 - (.properties.github_merged_prs_last_month // 0) * 7) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
github_throughput_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR throughput rate
github_throughput_trend.title: PR Throughput Trend

github_weekly_workflow_failure_rate.calculation: if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_7d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d) * 100 | floor else 0 end
github_weekly_workflow_failure_rate.description: Percentage of workflow runs that failed in the last 7 days
github_weekly_workflow_failure_rate.title: Weekly Workflow Failure Rate (%)

deploy_freq_tier.calculation: if (.properties.total_deployments == null or .properties.total_deployments == 0) then "Low" else (if (.properties.services_count != null and .properties.services_count != 0) then ((.properties.deployment_frequency // 0) / .properties.services_count) else 0 end) as $dpf | if $dpf >= 7 then "Elite" elif $dpf >= 1 then "High" elif $dpf >= 0.25 then "Medium" else "Low" end end
deploy_freq_tier.title: Deployment Frequency

deployment_frequency_per_service.calculation: if (.properties.total_deployments == null or .properties.total_deployments == 0) then null elif (.properties.services_count != null and .properties.services_count != 0) then (.properties.deployment_frequency // 0) / .properties.services_count else null end
deployment_frequency_per_service.description: Average successful deployments per service per week
deployment_frequency_per_service.title: Deployment Frequency per Service (per week)

failure_rate_trend.calculation: ((if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end) - (if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_7d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_7d) * 100 | floor else 0 end)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
failure_rate_trend.description: Weekly failure rate vs monthly average — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
failure_rate_trend.title: Workflow Failure Rate Trend

github_cycle_time_trend.calculation: ((.properties.github_pr_cycle_time // 0) - (.properties.github_pr_cycle_time_weekly // 0)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
github_cycle_time_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR cycle time — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
github_cycle_time_trend.title: PR Cycle Time Trend

github_lead_time_tier.calculation: if (.properties.github_lead_time_for_change == null) then "Low" elif .properties.github_lead_time_for_change <= 24 then "Elite" elif .properties.github_lead_time_for_change <= 168 then "High" elif .properties.github_lead_time_for_change <= 720 then "Medium" else "Low" end
github_lead_time_tier.description: DORA lead time for changes tier
github_lead_time_tier.title: Lead Time for Changes

github_merged_prs_per_service_last_month.calculation: if (.properties.services_count != null and .properties.services_count != 0) then (.properties.github_merged_prs_last_month / .properties.services_count) else 0 end
github_merged_prs_per_service_last_month.description: PRs merged in the last 30 days divided by number of services
github_merged_prs_per_service_last_month.title: Monthly PR Throughput per Service

github_open_prs_per_service.calculation: if (.properties.services_count != null and .properties.services_count != 0) then (.properties.github_open_prs / .properties.services_count) else 0 end
github_open_prs_per_service.description: Open PR count divided by number of services owned by the team
github_open_prs_per_service.title: Open PRs per Service

github_stale_pr_share_percent.calculation: if (.properties.github_open_prs != null and .properties.github_open_prs != 0) then (.properties.github_stale_prs_7d / .properties.github_open_prs) * 100 else 0 end
github_stale_pr_share_percent.description: Percentage of open PRs that are older than 7 days
github_stale_pr_share_percent.title: Stale PR Share (%)

github_stale_prs_per_service_7d.calculation: if (.properties.services_count != null and .properties.services_count != 0) then (.properties.github_stale_prs_7d / .properties.services_count) else 0 end
github_stale_prs_per_service_7d.description: Open PRs older than 7 days divided by number of services
github_stale_prs_per_service_7d.title: Stale PRs per Service

github_throughput_trend.calculation: ((.properties.github_merged_prs_last_week // 0) * 30 - (.properties.github_merged_prs_last_month // 0) * 7) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
github_throughput_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR throughput rate — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
github_throughput_trend.title: PR Throughput Trend

monthly_workflow_failure_rate.calculation: if (.properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.github_failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.github_workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end
monthly_workflow_failure_rate.description: Percentage of workflow runs that failed in the last 30 days
monthly_workflow_failure_rate.title: Monthly Workflow Failure Rate (%)

description: This blueprint is synced with Port teams
title: Team

description: This blueprint is synced with active or invited Port users
title: User

is_stale.calculation: if (.properties.status == "open" and (((now / 86400) - (.properties.createdAt | capture("(?<date>\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})") | .date | strptime("%Y-%m-%d") | mktime / 86400) | floor) > 7)) then true else false end
is_stale.description: True when this PR is open and older than 7 days
is_stale.title: Is Stale (7d+)

pr_age_label.calculation: ((if .properties.mergedAt == null then (now / 86400) else (.properties.mergedAt | capture("(?<date>\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})") | .date | strptime("%Y-%m-%d") | mktime / 86400) end) as $toDate | $toDate - (.properties.createdAt | capture("(?<date>\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2})") | .date | strptime("%Y-%m-%d") | mktime / 86400) | floor) as $daysOld | if $daysOld <= 3 then "0-3 days" elif $daysOld <= 7 then "3-7 days" elif $daysOld <= 30 then "7-30 days" else ">30 days" end
pr_age_label.description: Classifies a PR into 0-3 days | 3-7 days | 7-30 days | >30 days
pr_age_label.title: PR Age

cycle_time_hours.description: Time from PR creation to merge in hours.
cycle_time_hours.title: PR Cycle Time (Hours)

lead_time_hours.description: DORA Lead Time for Changes — time from first commit to merge in hours. Falls back to PR creation if commit data unavailable.
lead_time_hours.title: Lead Time for Changes (Hours)

reviewDecision.description: The review decision state of the pull request
reviewDecision.title: Review Decision

workflow_runs_7d.description: Total workflow runs in the last 7 days
workflow_runs_7d.title: Weekly Workflow Runs

cycle_time_trend.calculation: ((.properties.pr_cycle_time // 0) - (.properties.pr_cycle_time_weekly // 0)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
cycle_time_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR cycle time — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
cycle_time_trend.title: PR Cycle Time Trend

failure_rate_trend.calculation: ((if (.properties.workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end) - (if (.properties.workflow_runs_7d != null and .properties.workflow_runs_7d != 0) then ((.properties.failed_workflow_runs_7d // 0) / .properties.workflow_runs_7d) * 100 | floor else 0 end)) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
failure_rate_trend.description: Weekly failure rate vs monthly average — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
failure_rate_trend.title: Workflow Failure Rate Trend

monthly_workflow_failure_rate.calculation: if (.properties.workflow_runs_30d != null and .properties.workflow_runs_30d != 0) then ((.properties.failed_workflow_runs_30d // 0) / .properties.workflow_runs_30d) * 100 | floor else 0 end
monthly_workflow_failure_rate.description: Percentage of workflow runs that failed in the last 30 days
monthly_workflow_failure_rate.title: Monthly Workflow Failure Rate (%)

stale_pr_share_percent.calculation: if (.properties.open_prs != null and .properties.open_prs != 0) then (.properties.stale_prs_7d / .properties.open_prs) * 100 else 0 end
stale_pr_share_percent.description: Percentage of open PRs that are older than 7 days
stale_pr_share_percent.title: Stale PR Share (%)

throughput_trend.calculation: ((.properties.merged_prs_last_week // 0) * 30 - (.properties.merged_prs_last_month // 0) * 7) as $diff | if $diff > 0 then "Improving" elif $diff < 0 then "Degrading" else "Stable" end
throughput_trend.description: Weekly vs monthly PR throughput rate — Improving, Stable, or Degrading
throughput_trend.title: PR Throughput Trend

weekly_workflow_failure_rate.calculation: if (.properties.workflow_runs_7d != null and .properties.workflow_runs_7d != 0) then ((.properties.failed_workflow_runs_7d // 0) / .properties.workflow_runs_7d) * 100 | floor else 0 end
weekly_workflow_failure_rate.description: Percentage of workflow runs that failed in the last 7 days
weekly_workflow_failure_rate.title: Weekly Workflow Failure Rate (%)

last_push.description: Last commit to the main branch
last_push.title: Last Repository Push

rules_passed.description: Number of rule tests with the result "passed"
rules_passed.title: Rules passed

blueprint.description: The blueprint tested by this scorecard
blueprint.title: Blueprint

filter.description: Filters entities that should be tested with this scorecard
filter.title: Filter

levels.description: Defines the levels ladder for this scorecard
levels.title: Levels

handlingDuration.calculation: if (.properties.resolutionDate != null and .properties.created != null) then ((.properties.resolutionDate[0:19] + "Z" | fromdateiso8601) - (.properties.created[0:19] + "Z" | fromdateiso8601)) / 86400 else null end
handlingDuration.description: The amount of time in days from issue creation to issue resolution
handlingDuration.title: Handling Duration (Days)

project.description: The Jira project that contains this issue
project.title: Project

components.description: The components related to this issue
components.title: Components

created.description: The created datetime of the issue
created.title: Created At

creator.description: The user that created to the issue
creator.title: Creator

resolutionDate.description: The datetime the issue changed to a resolved state
resolutionDate.title: Resolved At

updated.description: The updated datetime of the issue
updated.title: Updated At

url.description: URL to the issue in Jira
url.title: Issue URL
